name: Ginger Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Heat and simmer for 3 minutes.
3. Pour over greens while still hot.
For best results, use this dressing with baby Pak Choi and other oriental greens. It also pairs well with cooked shrimp; marinate the shrimp in the dressing before adding them to the greens.
